claim_boundary: Diagnostic-only closed-loop forecast coupling gate. Not paper-facing evidence. No learned training involved.
diagnostic_notes: Forecast interaction_aware worsened 1s ADE by 0.0246 m vs CV and improved 1s NLL by 0.6717. Closed-loop gate failed (reason=global_success_delta_below_gate, global_success_delta=0.0). Recommendation: revise forecast coupling before closed-loop claims.

forecast_interaction_effect.conclusion: Interaction-aware heuristic improved Gaussian likelihood/calibration proxy but worsened point accuracy on matched diagnostic rows; revise before closed-loop coupling claims.
